zh.lifeSummary: John Leonard於1615年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾朋普爾。他於1640年11月12日與Sarah Heath在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Leonard于1615年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾朋普爾。他于1640年11月12日与Sarah Heath在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯普林菲爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年3月20日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德斯普林菲爾德 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Leonard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Leonardo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Fernando, Carlos, Ernesto, Felipe, Guillermo, Julio, Luz, Mario, Alberto, Altagracia.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Carmelo, Dario, Ercole, Filomena, Giuseppe, Marco, Mauro, Oreste, Pasco, Quintino.  Portuguese Joao, Paulo.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’ (see Leonard ).

variants.name: Langan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Declan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Longáin ‘descendant of Longán’, a personal name probably derived from long ‘tall’, or perhaps from a homonymous long ‘ship’ (and so originally a byname for a seafarer). Sometimes Leonard is used as an equivalent.

variants.name: Learnard
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . Compare   Learned  .

variants.name: Lenhard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hermann, Kurt, Urs.
Dutch and North German: from the personal name Leonhard (see Leonard ).

variants.name: Lenhart
meanings: North German, and Czech: from the personal name Leonhard (see Leonard , Lenart ).

variants.name: Lence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Joaquin, Caridad, Carmella, Delfina, Domingo, Fidelia, Marta, Roberto, Sergio.
Galician: habitational name from any of the four places called Lence.
Slovenian (Lenče): from a pet form of the personal names Lenart (see Leonard ) and Magdalena (see Maudlin ).

variants.name: Lehn
meanings: German:
from a short form of the personal name Leonhard, see Leonard .
habitational name from any of various places of that name.

variants.name: Learned
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Lenard
meanings: English and Irish; French (Lénard): variant of Leonard , French Léonard.

Polish, German, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Lénárd); Slovak (also Lenárd and Lénárd): from local vernacular forms of the personal name Leonard (German Leonhard ). In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of patronymics (and other derivatives) from this name, such as Croatian Lenardić and Slovenian Lenardič.

variants.name: Lenart
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Agnieszka, Bronislawa, Henryk, Henryka, Jacek, Janina, Leslaw, Stanislaw, Tadeusz, Witold, Zofia.

Polish, Czech, Slovenian, Croatian, and German; Slovak (Lenárt); Hungarian (Lénárt): from the personal name Lenart, Slovak Lenárt, Hungarian Lénárt, equivalents of Leonard (German Leonhard ). In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of patronymics (and other derivatives) from this name, such as Polish Lenartowicz , Slovenian Lenarčič and Lenartič, Croatian Lenartić.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

historicEvents.description: “Agawam…the earliest of the Springfield Settlements was almost the last to be made a separate town. For more than a century it was part of Springfield, but in 1774, The General Court created a separate town, West Springfield, of all that part of Springfield that lay west of the Connecticut. Agawam had to wait eighty years more for independence. It had retained its original appellation as a local name, and very properly adopted it when incorporated as a town in 1855. While the Agawam territory was designated as the Feeding Hills for cattle in 1638, the first permanent settlement south of the Agawam River was made in 1685 when grants were made to Thomas Cooper, Abel Leonard, and Thomas Merrick of Springfield.” The first house in the region was built in the Agawam Meadows by John Cable and John Woodcock in 1635.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Town of Agawam, Massachusetts - Historical Commission

en.lifeSummary: John Leonard was born in 1615, in Pontypool, Monmouthshire, Wales. He married Sarah Heath on 12 November 1640, in Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 20 March 1676, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Pontypool, Monmouthshire, Wales: ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアポントイプオオル
ja.lifeSummary: John Leonardは1615年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアポントイプオオルで生まれた。1640年11月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースプリングフィールドでSarah Heathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年3月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドスプリングフィールド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드
ko.Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hamps: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리
ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.lifeSummary: John Leonard(은)는 1615년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 폰티포에서 태어났다. 그는 1640년 11월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스프링필드에서 Sarah Heath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 3월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드 스프링필드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Leonard nasceu em 1615, em Pontypool, Monmouthshire, Gales. Ele casou-se com Sarah Heath em 12 de novembro de 1640, em Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de março de 1676, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Springfield, Hampshire, Province of Mass: спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: John Leonard родился в 1615 г. в местности понтипул, монмоутшир, Уэльс. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Heath 12 ноября 1640 г. в местности спрингфиелд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 20 марта 1676 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд кеметири, спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: John Leonard nació en 1615, en Pontypool, Monmouthshire, Gales. Se casó con Sarah Heath el 12 de noviembre de 1640, en Springfield, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1676, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield Cemetery, Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
